description: Create a user-defined label at a point in space. These labels can be visualized with the plotting logic, identifying regions of interest.

keywords.name: arrow
keywords.description: Specifies whether the line connecting v1 to v2 ends with an arrowhead. This only applies if the end has been specified.

keywords.name: end
keywords.description: If the end is specified as different from v1 , then the label will include a line going from v1 to v2 .

keywords.name: name
keywords.description: Assign a unique name to the label for later reference. If not specified then a name based on the internally assigned ID number is generated.

keywords.name: text
keywords.description: Sets the label’s text to be s . This text will be output to the screen at the location defined by v1 .
